subcodes.first_line: O Haydar-'Alí, upon thee be My Glory! If thou shouldst journey unto the land of Sh, thou must needs, in the company of the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حیدر قبل علی علیک بهائی اگر شما بارض ش توجه نمودید باید در محل احبای
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @wisdom [hikmat]
